message:
feat(tests): add 28 property tests for flake_classifier and error_hints

Flake classifier: classify_failure never panics, transient/deterministic
invariants, case insensitivity, noise prefix tolerance, serde roundtrips,
retry policy bounds. Error hints: hints_for_error never panics, summary
cleanliness, context field validity, keyword-triggered hint stability,
format_error_with_hints suggestions-iff-hints invariant.

bd-3ar8v.11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
